summary.zh: Windows 沙箱恢复以 PowerShell 为默认一次性命令，审查通过后的提权可真正离开受限环境执行；并修复会话并发加载导致切换失败、带引号/多行命令，以及经验回忆工具装配等问题。
summary.en: Windows sandbox again defaults one-shot commands to PowerShell, and reviewed escalation can leave the restricted environment; also fixes session-switch failures from concurrent loads, quoted/multiline commands, and experience-recall tool assembly.

title.zh: Windows 沙箱恢复 PowerShell 默认
title.en: Windows sandbox restores PowerShell as default

summary.zh: 一次性命令默认回到 PowerShell（优先 pwsh）；沙箱会把 TEMP 指到可写根并先做启动探测，通过后正常运行，探测失败则快速报错，不再静默改走 cmd。
summary.en: One-shot commands default to PowerShell again (pwsh preferred); the sandbox redirects TEMP into its write root and probes startup first—pass and run, fail fast if every PowerShell candidate fails, with no silent cmd fallback.

sources.title: feat(windows): restore PowerShell as the sandboxed one-shot default with a startup probe
fix(windows): redirect TEMP/TMP into the sandbox write root for every helper launch
fix(windows): promote the sandbox scratch root to a required writable-root for TEMP redirect

title.zh: 审查通过的提权可真正离开沙箱
title.en: Reviewed escalation can leave the sandbox

summary.zh: require_escalated 在 Windows 上经审查后会在受限令牌外执行；同时必须附上一句理由。破坏性命令模式在任何模式下仍被拦住。
summary.en: On Windows, reviewed require_escalated runs outside the restricted token, and a one-sentence justification is required. Destructive command patterns stay blocked in every mode.

sources.title: feat(windows): make require_escalated run outside the restricted-token sandbox after review
feat(exec): require a one-sentence justification for require_escalated

title.zh: 带引号与多行命令不再误伤
title.en: Quoted and multiline commands no longer break

summary.zh: 含双引号的 cmd 命令会原样到达；多行命令的权限描述也能正常通过校验。
summary.en: cmd payloads with embedded quotes reach cmd.exe intact, and multiline side-effect descriptors pass permission validation.

sources.title: fix(windows): pass cmd payloads verbatim through both spawn paths
fix(permission): accept bounded whitespace in invocation sideEffect strings

title.zh: 会话并发加载不再导致切换失败
title.en: Concurrent session loads no longer break switching

summary.zh: 同一会话被同时加载时只建一份实例，避免孤儿写入破坏历史，切换时也不再因此 HTTP 500。
summary.en: Concurrent loads of the same session share one in-flight create path, so orphaned writers no longer corrupt history and session switches stop failing with HTTP 500.

sources.title: fix(session): dedupe concurrent ensureSessionLoaded calls for the same session path

title.zh: 经验回忆工具可正常装配

summary.zh: 开启经验能力时，recall_experience 已声明只读权限，会话工具装配不再因此中断。
summary.en: With experience enabled, recall_experience declares read permission so session tool assembly no longer throws.

sources.title: fix(tools): declare read permission for recall_experience and add built-in coverage regression

summary.zh: 模型侧与错误提示统一说明：沙箱拦住且任务需要时，可带理由重试提权；日文/韩文文案也已补齐。
summary.en: Model guidance and error text now share one escalation contract—retry with justification when the sandbox blocks something needed—and Japanese/Korean copy is filled in.

sources.title: fix(exec): rewrite escalation guidance to match Codex on_request phrasing
fix(i18n): add the escalation-hint locale key to ja and ko too
